personal_info.name: Example Candidate
personal_info.summary: Software Engineer with commercial experience developing enterprise web applications, APIs and data-driven solutions using C#, ASP.NET Core, TypeScript, React and SQL. Recently expanded expertise into Generative AI and agent-based applications, including intelligent support agents, tool-calling workflows and AI automation. Seeking opportunities as an AI Engineer, Agent Engineer or AI Application Developer.

experiences.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed and enhanced enterprise web applications using Angular, TypeScript, ASP.NET Core and SQL Server across the full application stack.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs and backend services to support secure and reliable system integrations.
Optimised SQL Server database structures, queries and stored procedures, improving application performance and production stability.
Collaborated with stakeholders and development teams to analyse requirements and deliver fit-for-purpose software solutions.
Explored AI-assisted development workflows, prompt engineering and agent-based automation to streamline repetitive engineering tasks.

experiences.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed React and Angular frontend components alongside ASP.NET Core backend services within an Agile delivery environment.
Built and maintained REST APIs supporting authentication, business workflows and data integration requirements.
Assisted with database design, SQL optimisation and defect resolution to improve software reliability and maintainability.

projects.name: AI Support Agent
projects.description: Example personal project — AI agent system with autonomous reasoning and tool calling
bullets: Built an AI agent system capable of autonomous reasoning, tool calling and workflow execution using modern agent patterns.
Developed agent-based workflows for documentation retrieval, support automation and task management through dynamic tool orchestration.
Designed reusable tool interfaces and validation layers using TypeScript and schema-based input validation.
